chunks.text: Seth Sanders participating in Advancements in Storage Technology at the STUDIO Conference in SF - EECS at Berkeley Prof. Seth Sanders is featured in a Yahoo Finance article about his participation in a panel discussion on Advancements in Storage Technology at the STUDIO Conference in San Francisco on August 3. Prof. Sanders is the chief scientist and co-founder of Amber Kinetics , Inc., developer of the world’s first commercially ready four-hour flywheel energy storage system. Categories Entrepreneurship Faculty Industry View Open Faculty Positions
